name: ls-get-life-science-products
description: Returns life sciences IV fluid products with stock levels and AUD pricing (per bag and per case). With productName and quantity, returns line price—for example 6 bags of Normal Saline. No separate pricing API required.

productName.description: Product name or alias (Normal Saline, D5LR, saline, product 1). Aliases: product, search, query, productId.

quantity.description: Requested quantity for availability check. Aliases: qty.

unit.description: case, cases, bag, or bags. Defaults to bag when omitted.
